creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
On 10/20/2011 11:47 PM, Florian Smeets wrote:
> It works fine with the following changes. Should i commit it like this?
>
> I looked at the config.h we have in src/ for the additional
> --disable/--without switches.
>
> Cheers,
> Florian
>
> --- Makefile.orig 2011-10-20 23:43:40.000000000 +0200
> +++ Makefile 2011-10-20 23:39:20.000000000 +0200
> @@ -21,7 +21,7 @@
> MAN1= sftp.1 ssh-add.1 ssh-agent.1 ssh-keygen.1 ssh-keyscan.1 scp.1 ssh.1
> MLINKS= ssh.1 slogin.1
> MAN5= moduli.5 ssh_config.5 sshd_config.5
> -MAN8= sftp-server.8 sshd.8 ssh-keysign.8
> +MAN8= sftp-server.8 sshd.8 ssh-keysign.8 ssh-pkcs11-helper.8
>
> CONFLICTS?= openssh-3.* ssh-1.* ssh2-3.*
>
> @@ -58,7 +58,7 @@
> .endif
>
> .if ${OSVERSION} >= 900007
> -CONFIGURE_ARGS+= --disable-utmp
> +CONFIGURE_ARGS+= --disable-utmp --disable-wtmp --disable-wtmpx
> --without-lastlog
> .endif
>
> .if defined(WITH_X509) && defined(WITH_HPN)


Please commit Your changes too.
PS: Thanks for quick reaction.
